prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约738名，2023年因宏福校区招生出现较大波动至约2227名，2024年回落至约2016名，2025年物理类最低位次约826名。近两年位次波动较大 ，2025年已恢复至800名附近水平，整体呈先降后升态势；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022年37人、2023年37人、2024年38人、2025年40人，2026年计划41人，较2025年小幅扩招1人（+2.5%），扩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京邮电大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，2026年软科中国大学排名 第50名，较2025年的第60名上升10位，首次进入全国前50强，学校综合实力和声誉持续提升，对高分考生吸引力增强；该校近年未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音 平台热度评价为"一般"，综合热度约47.9万，在211高校中处于中等水平，无明显热度异常信号；信息与通信工程获评A+（全国顶尖），计算机科学与技术获评A ，电子科学与技术、光学工程、网络空间安全、软件工程均获评A-，共6个A-及以上学科，信息通信领域学科优势突出，对相关专业考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机、通信、人工智能等专业社会热度持续较高，北邮作为信息通信领域标杆院校受益明显；宁夏2026年物理类考生约4.46万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争基数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次826名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招1人、软科排名跃升至全国第50名（竞争加剧信号）、考生规模基本持平等因素， 预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有提升（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约823名，区间700-946名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）
- 电子信息类（元班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
- 计算机类
- 电子信息类
- 人工智能（大类招生）
- 网络空间安全（大类招生）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间700-946名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档元班专业可冲刺（2025年元班最低位次约358-380名，远高于预测区间），三档专业作为保底选择。位次明 显优于区间上限（<700名）可重点冲刺一档元班专业；位次在区间中段（约823名附近）以二档通信工程、计算机类为核心目标。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 738. In 2023, due to significant fluctuations in the Hongfu campus enrollment, it dropped to about 2227. In 2024, it fell back to around 2016. In 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was about 826. Rankings have fluctuated greatly in the past two years, but in 2025 they have recovered to around 800, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science/physics categories was 37 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 40 in 2025, and 41 planned for 2026, a slight expansion of 1 student (+2.5%) compared to 2025. The expansion is small and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 50th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, up 10 places from 60th in 2025, entering the national top 50 for the first time. The university's comprehensive strength and reputation continue to improve, increasing its appeal to high-scoring students. There have been no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. On the Douyin platform, its popularity rating is 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 479,000, which is at a medium level among 211 universities, with no abnormal popularity signals. Information and Communication Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology is rated A, and Electronic Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Cyberspace Security, and Software Engineering are all rated A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above. The university has outstanding disciplinary advantages in the field of information and communication, strongly attracting students interested in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, communication, and artificial intelligence continue to be highly popular in society. As a benchmark university in the field of information and communication, BUPT benefits significantly. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Ningxia is about 44,600, roughly the same as in 2025, keeping the competition base stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 826, the slight expansion of 1 student in the 2026 enrollment plan, the Soft Science ranking jumping to 50th nationally (a signal of increased competition), and the basically stable number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 823, with a range of 700-946.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)

- Electronic Information Class (Yuan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Computer Class
- Electronic Information Class

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Software Engineering
- Automation Class (Intelligent Robots)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Information Computing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 700-946, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 Yuan Class majors as a reach (the minimum ranking for Yuan Class in 2025 was about 358-380, far above the predicted range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety choice. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<700), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 823), target Tier 2 majors such as Communication Engineering and Computer Class as core goals.
